summary: CV Family & Schooling census — discovery fan-out (geo×subcategory cells, Sonnet workers)
logs: Batch 2: 2 discovery cells (Sonnet 4.6 workers, ~3-4 searches each)...
Batch 2 complete: 2/2 cells returned, 49 raw candidates. Spend so far: 169k tokens
